title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) neuroendocrine gastrointestinal clinical N category
description: A clinical regional lymph node stage (cN) of a neuroendocrine gastrointestinal tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
